scripts.electron:build: cross-env VITE_API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api VITE_WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com npm run build && cross-env API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com node scripts/write-electron-config.cjs && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: cross-env VITE_API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api VITE_WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com npm run build && cross-env API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com node scripts/write-electron-config.cjs && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --x64 --arm64
scripts.electron:build:mac:signed: cross-env VITE_API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api VITE_WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com npm run build && cross-env API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com node scripts/write-electron-config.cjs && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=true electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:publish: cross-env VITE_API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api VITE_WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com npm run build && cross-env API_BASE=https://hrmsbackend.yoforex.net/api WEB_BASE=https://emptrakr.com node scripts/write-electron-config.cjs && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win -p always
